title: chionanthus ferrugineus
intro: Chionanthus ferrugineus, also known as the Chinese fruittree or Chinese parasol tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae, native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Chionanthus ferrugineus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu, and act as an anti-oxidant to protect against cell damage. Chionanthus ferrugineus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine as a dried herb or in the form of a tincture.
